title: Enderscape's Delight
description: Enderscape's Delight is a mod that makes Enderscape and Farmer's Delight to Connect. It introuces new foods that are themed from Enderscape's content!
body:
Requires:[Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape), [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). 


### **Description**

> Enderscape's Delight is an addon of both Enderscape and Farmer's Delight. The mod adds new foods themed around Enderscape and new ingredients to make those foods. 


**THIS MOD IS IN BETA NOT EVERYTHING WILL BE FINAL AND NEW CONTENT WILL BE ADDED**
